misc: Doubles as a professional model as his side hustle
Few players dare to give him lip due to his intimidating presence and wrestling skills
biography: Olli, a force to be reckoned with on the greens, hails from the prestigious Helsingin Golfklubi. Beyond his golfing prowess, Olli also earns a living as a professional model.

Known for his intimidating presence and rumored wrestling skills, few players dare to challenge him on or off the course. His intense focus and determination make him a formidable competitor in any format, be it individual play for the Victor Trophy or paired for the coveted Hector Trophée.

Hector Trophée 2026 marks Olli's ninth appearance in the prestigious tournament. While the Hector Trophée and Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, his unwavering dedication suggests that it is only a matter of time before he hoists one or both trophies.
